lane: isolated H2 saved/transient source plus PostgreSQL fault injection

liveCases.detail: Saved H2 source returned HTTP 200, product H2, elapsedMs 614.
Transient H2 test returned HTTP 200; source inventory remained 1 to 1; no transient source persisted.
Wrong H2 password returned HTTP 400 [AUTH]; no fixture secret or stack trace was exposed.
DNS returned HTTP 400 [DNS] in 313 ms; refused port returned HTTP 400 [NETWORK] in 22 ms.
Black-holed PostgreSQL endpoint returned HTTP 400 [TIMEOUT] in 8041 ms, within the configured 8 second budget.
Eight concurrent saved-source tests all returned HTTP 200 in 15492 ms; UI request sequencing prevents stale completion overwrite.
Saved H2 diagnostics returned HTTP 200, identified H2, and did not expose the fixture secret.

hardPassExceptions.reason: No paired trusted and untrusted TLS JDBC endpoints are provisioned.
No endpoint has a certificate intentionally mismatched to its hostname.
No isolated valid low-privilege account is provisioned for metadata/table capability checks.
